mapper.select: select * from appr_form f where f.com_id = #{comId} and f.for_status = 1 and f.is_deleted = 0 and f.for_version = ( select max(ff.for_version) from appr_form ff where ff.com_id = f.com_id and ff.for_id = f.for_id and ff.for_status = 1 and ff.is_deleted = 0 )
select * from appr_form where for_id = #{forId} and for_version = #{forVersion}

select e.emp_id, e.emp_name, p.pos_name, c.com_id, c.com_name, d.dept_id, d.dept_name from employee e inner join company c on e.com_id = c.com_id inner join department d on e.dept_id = d.dept_id inner join emp_position p on e.pos_id = p.pos_id where e.emp_id = #{empId}
mapper.insert:
select appr_doc_seq.nextval from dual
insert into appr_doc( doc_id, emp_id, for_id, for_version, com_id, doc_title, doc_content, doc_status, is_important) values( #{docId}, #{empId}, #{forId}, #{forVersion}, #{comId}, #{docTitle}, #{docContent}, #{docStatus}, #{isImportant})
mapper.select: select count(distinct case when d.emp_id = #{empId} or l.emp_id = #{empId} then d.doc_id end) as "TOTALCNT", count(distinct case when (d.emp_id = #{empId} or l.emp_id = #{empId}) and d.doc_status = 'ING' then d.doc_id end) as "WAICNT", count(distinct case when (d.emp_id = #{empId} or l.emp_id = #{empId}) and d.doc_status = 'APP' then d.doc_id end) as "APPCNT", count(distinct case when (d.emp_id = #{empId} or l.emp_id = #{empId}) and d.doc_status = 'REJ' then d.doc_id end) as "REJCNT" from appr_doc d left join appr_line l on d.doc_id = l.doc_id where d.emp_id = #{empId} or l.emp_id = #{empId}

select distinct d.doc_id, d.doc_title, d.emp_id, d.doc_status, d.is_important, d.created_at, (select emp_name from employee where emp_id = d.emp_id) as emp_name from appr_doc d left join appr_line l on d.doc_id = l.doc_id where d.emp_id = #{empId} or (l.emp_id = #{empId} and l.lin_status in ('APP', 'REJ', 'WAI'))
and d.doc_status = #{searchStatus}
and ( d.doc_id like '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' or d.doc_title like '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' or (select emp_name from employee where emp_id = d.emp_id) like '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' )
order by d.created_at desc offset #{pstartno} rows fetch next #{onepagelist} rows only

select d.doc_id, d.doc_title, d.emp_id, d.doc_status, d.is_important, d.created_at, (select emp_name from employee where emp_id = d.emp_id) as emp_name from appr_doc d inner join appr_line l on d.doc_id = l.doc_id where l.emp_id = #{empId} and l.lin_status = 'WAI' and d.doc_status = 'ING'
and ( d.doc_id like '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' or d.doc_title like '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' or (select emp_name from employee where emp_id = d.emp_id) like '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' )
order by d.created_at desc offset #{pstartno} rows fetch next #{onepagelist} rows only

select count(*) from appr_doc d inner join appr_line l on d.doc_id = l.doc_id where l.emp_id = #{empId} and l.lin_status = 'WAI' and d.doc_status = 'ING'
and ( d.doc_id like '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' or d.doc_title like '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' or (select emp_name from employee where emp_id = d.emp_id) like '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' )

select e.emp_id, e.emp_name, p.pos_name from employee e join emp_position p on e.pos_id = p.pos_id where e.dept_id = (select dept_id from employee where emp_id = #{empId}) and e.emp_id != #{empId} order by p.pos_order desc

select d.doc_id, d.doc_title, d.doc_content, d.doc_status, d.is_important, d.created_at, d.emp_id, (select emp_name from employee where emp_id = d.emp_id) as emp_name from appr_doc d where doc_id = #{docId}
